text:
support
Reply-To: Eric Ekong <eric@unixtechs.org>
Organization: UNIXTECHS
X-Operating-System: FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE i386 12:02PM  up 4 days, 13:45, 5 users, load averages: 4.08, 2.21, 1.60
X-Editor: Vim http://www.vim.org/
X-Mailer: Mutt http://www.mutt.org/
X-Info: http://www.unixtechs.org/
Disposition-Notification-To: Eric Ekong <eric@unixtechs.org>

I haven't been able to build sdl12 for a while now since I have
devel/directfb installed. What I was able to accomplish from
looking at the current patch listed above was opening ...
patch-src__video__directfb__SDL_DirectFB_video.c

-#include <directfb.h>
-#include <directfb_version.h>
+#include <directfb/directfb.h>
+#include <directfb-internal/directfb_version.h>

Those are the only changes I made.  The rest in the file listed were
okay and all is working fine now.  When can we expect these to be
available in an update SDL port?

Eric

        (1) In order to discover anything, you must be looking for
            something.
        (2) If you wish to make an improved product, you must already
            be engaged in making an inferior one.
